/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pwordcount.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/pwordcount.dir/pwordcount.c.o CMakeFiles/pwordcount.dir/pwc_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/pwordcount.dir/pwc_reader.c.o CMakeFiles/pwordcount.dir/pwc_counter.c.o CMakeFiles/pwordcount.dir/pwc_counterManager.c.o CMakeFiles/pwordcount.dir/pwc_logger.c.o CMakeFiles/pwordcount.dir/pwc_config.c.o -o pwordcount
